title: LATERAL crash /.../rel_bin.c:1473: rel2bin_table: Assertion `0' failed.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE segments (meter INT NOT NULL, distance INT CHECK (distance >= 0), speed FLOAT DEFAULT 0.0);
INSERT INTO segments (meter, distance, speed) VALUES (1, 1, 1), (9, 9, 9), (NULL, 5, 3);
SELECT s.meter, s.distance, s.speed FROM segments AS s;
SELECT s.meter, s.distance, s.speed FROM segments AS s WHERE s.speed IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Using LATERAL with generate_series on segments table
